semantic.role: GitHub Actions workflow template for automated architecture sync and compliance checking in pull requests
responsibilities: Run spine sync and check on pull request events (opened, synchronize, reopened)
Post a PR comment with architecture violations when check fails
Fail the workflow on violations to block merging
Update existing comments instead of creating duplicates
outOfScope: Detailed configuration of ArchSpine rules or sync options

English.purpose: This document provides a ready-to-use GitHub Actions workflow that enforces architectural governance automatically on every pull request. It runs ArchSpine's sync and check commands, reports violations as PR comments, and blocks merging if architecture rules are violated.
English.context_and_audience: This template is intended for DevOps engineers and project maintainers who want to integrate ArchSpine into their CI pipeline using GitHub Actions. It assumes the repository has already been initialized with spine init and that an LLM API key has been configured as a GitHub secret.
key_takeaways: Automates architecture validation on every PR for consistent governance
Requires only basic setup: initializing spine and adding an LLM API key
Provides clear failure feedback via PR comments and workflow exit code
Keeps comments concise and updates them on new pushes to avoid spam
